questions.question: Paul says a true widow is one who has set her hope on what?
questions.feedback: A true widow is one left all alone who has set her hope on God and continues in prayer.

questions.question: What minimum age does Paul give for a widow to be enrolled for church support?
questions.feedback: A widow enrolled must be at least sixty years old.

questions.question: Paul says elders who rule well should be considered worthy of double honor.
questions.feedback: Elders who rule well are worthy of double honor, especially those who labor in preaching and teaching.

questions.question: Paul says anyone who does not provide for relatives has denied the _____ and is worse than an unbeliever.
questions.feedback: Failing to provide for relatives is denying the faith.

questions.question: Paul advises Timothy to use a little _____ for his stomach and frequent ailments.
questions.feedback: Paul advises a little wine for Timothy's stomach problems.
